Class DroneBase

java.lang.Object
model.DroneBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DroneBase extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a drone base that contains drones
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • DroneBase

      public DroneBase(String id, String name, Position position, int capacity)
      Creates a drone base.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      name - base name
      position - base position
      capacity - maximum number of drones

  • Method Details

    • addDrone

      public void addDrone(Drone drone)
      Adds a drone to this base.
      Parameters:
      drone - drone to add
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the base is full

    • removeDrone

      public void removeDrone(Drone drone)
      Removes a drone from this base.
      Parameters:
      drone - drone to remove

    • getAvailableDrones

      public List<Drone> getAvailableDrones()
      Returns all drones in this base that are available for a mission.
      Returns:
      list of available drones

    • getId

      public String getId()

    • getName

      public String getName()

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()

    • getDrones

      public List<Drone> getDrones()
      Returns all drones registered in this base.
      Returns:
      list of all drones

    • updatePosition

      public void updatePosition(Position position)
      Updates the current position of the drone.
      Parameters:
      position - new position
